label.purpose: Nav links, tagline, captions, roadmap group labels and tags, footer — short functional text only.

code.purpose: The ledger card's literal file-tree snippet only.

shadows.name: hard-offset-ember
shadows.purpose: Hero screenshot frame. Zero blur, solid color, no rotation.

shadows.name: hard-offset-line
shadows.purpose: Gallery shots and the ledger card.

shadows.name: hard-offset-parchment
shadows.purpose: Inverse button on the ember closing section.

motion.name: press-state
motion.purpose: Button hover/active: element translates into its own hard-offset shadow, which collapses to zero — a literal press motion. The page's one recurring interactive signature.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Ember-filled CTA with a hard ink offset shadow that collapses on press. Used in the hero and as the small nav-cta (shadow suppressed at nav scale).
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 0.85em 1.7em; background: #e2a33b; color: #14110d; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.01em; font-size: 0.92rem; border: 2px solid #14110d; box-shadow: 7px 7px 0 0 #14110d; transition: transform 0.12s ease, box-shadow 0.12s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translate(7px, 7px); box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 #14110d; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #e2a33b; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Inverse Button
components.description: Ink-filled button with parchment text/border/offset — used only on the full-ember closing section, where the primary button would disappear into the background.
components.css: .ds-btn-inverse { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 0.85em 1.7em; background: #14110d; color: #ede3cc; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 0.92rem; border: 2px solid #ede3cc; box-shadow: 7px 7px 0 0 #ede3cc; transition: transform 0.12s ease, box-shadow 0.12s ease; } .ds-btn-inverse:hover { transform: translate(7px, 7px); box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 #ede3cc; }

components.name: Inline Link
components.description: Underlined secondary link, sentence case (never uppercase — reads as prose, not a label).
components.css: .ds-link { font-size: 0.95rem; color: #b7ac93; border-bottom: 2px solid #3a3226; padding: 6px 0; text-decoration: none; } .ds-link:hover, .ds-link:focus-visible { color: #ede3cc; border-bottom-color: #e2a33b; }

components.name: Image Frame
components.description: Zero-radius bordered frame with a hard offset shadow (no blur, no rotation) around hero and gallery screenshots.
components.css: .ds-shot { margin: 0; border: 2px solid #3a3226; background: #221d15; padding: 10px; box-shadow: 7px 7px 0 0 #3a3226; } .ds-shot img { display: block; width: 100%; height: auto; } .ds-shot figcaption { font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.03em; font-size: 0.72rem; color: #9d9179; padding: 12px 6px 4px; text-align: center; }

components.name: Legend Row
components.description: Icon + heading + description feature row; filled square icon block, zero radius, 2px hairline separators — the page's non-card feature-list pattern.
components.html:
Props you can pose

Corner, edge, and rotation handles right on the canvas.
components.css: .ds-legend-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 46px 1fr; gap: 18px; padding: 26px 0; border-top: 2px solid #2a251c; } .ds-legend-icon { width: 44px; height: 44px; border: 2px solid #3a3226; background: #221d15; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: #e2a33b; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-legend-text h3 { font-family: Archivo, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.05rem; margin: 0 0 6px; color: #ede3cc; } .ds-legend-text p { color: #b7ac93; font-size: 0.92rem; margin: 0; max-width: 40ch; }

components.name: Roadmap Tag
components.description: Zero-radius rectangular status chip — active (solid ember fill) vs planned (moss text, no fill), per-item, not a single hardcoded label.
components.html: em progresso no radar
components.css: .ds-tag { font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 0.7rem; letter-spacing: 0.03em; border: 2px solid #3a3226; padding: 0.3em 0.7em; width: fit-content; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-tag--active { color: #14110d; background: #e2a33b; border-color: #14110d; } .ds-tag--planned { color: #6d8f76; }

components.name: Highlight Block
components.description: Solid ember background directly behind a short inline text span — full-block emphasis without gradient-clip text or italics. One deliberate use per view (currently the hero headline).
components.css: .ds-hl { background: #e2a33b; color: #14110d; padding: 0 0.15em; box-decoration-break: clone; -webkit-box-decoration-break: clone; }

components.name: Mobile Nav Menu
components.description: Full-screen dark menu opened by the hamburger toggle under 860px.
components.html:
EditorMesa
Baixar Jaguar
components.css: .ds-nav-menu { position: fixed; inset: 0; background: #14110d; display: flex; flex-direction: column; padding: 20px 28px 40px; } .ds-nav-menu nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; margin-bottom: 32px; } .ds-nav-menu nav a { font-family: Archivo, sans-serif; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 1.3rem; color: #ede3cc; text-decoration: none; padding: 14px 0; border-bottom: 2px solid #2a251c; }

narrative.overview: Jaguar's landing page runs close to the hardware: one heavy sans family, hard edges, solid color blocks, thick rules, flat offset shadows with zero blur. This is the second real pass at the system: the first fixed individual components (removed a tracked-uppercase eyebrow, removed rotation on screenshots) but kept the underlying recipe — italic serif display + mono labels + hairline dividers — which is itself the most saturated brand-surface aesthetic of 2026. Patching symptoms inside a saturated recipe doesn't escape it. This pass replaces the recipe entirely: a single grotesque sans (Archivo) carrying the whole page through weight contrast alone, zero border-radius anywhere, 2px rules instead of 1px hairlines, and hard non-blurred offset shadows as the one recurring signature device. The ink/ember/moss/rust palette is kept as real brand equity, but its deployment shifts from Restrained (ember as a rare accent) to Committed (ember covers full solid sections when the moment earns it: the closing CTA, the hero highlight block). The previous torch-cursor hero mechanic was removed by deliberate choice, not preserved for its own sake — it belonged to the softer atmospheric system this pass replaces.
keyCharacteristics: One family (Archivo) for everything, carried by weight (700-900 display/labels, 400-500 body) instead of a display+body pairing.
Zero border-radius anywhere — every edge is a hard corner.
Hard offset shadows (Npx Npx 0 0 color, zero blur) as the one recurring signature device on framed images and buttons, with a press-on-hover motion.
Ember shifts from rare accent to occasional full-field commitment (closing section, hero highlight block).
Real product screenshots remain the primary persuasive device.

rules.name: The Committed Ember Rule
rules.body: Ember is allowed to be the dominant color of a whole section (the closing field, a text-highlight block) — a deliberate strategy shift from 'rare accent,' not scope creep. It still never shares a section with a second saturated hue.

rules.name: The One-Family Rule
rules.body: Every text role on the page is Archivo. Contrast comes from weight and case, never a second typeface. The only exception is the system monospace stack, reserved for literally-code/file-path content.

rules.name: The Hard-Offset-Only Rule
rules.body: Any shadow on this page is a flat, zero-blur, solid-color offset block — never a soft blurred glow. If a shadow has blur radius, it's a regression to the previous system.

dos: Do carry the whole page on one family (Archivo) through weight and case contrast.
Do keep every corner hard (zero radius).
Do use the hard-offset-shadow-plus-press-on-hover motif as the one recurring signature.
Do let ember go full-field when the moment earns it (closing section, hero highlight) — one section/moment at a time.
Do keep real product screenshots as the primary persuasive device.
Do keep a persistent primary CTA reachable (nav-cta) on any long scrolling page.
Do give status pills their real per-item state rather than one hardcoded label.
donts: Don't reintroduce a serif display font, italics, or a decorative mono label anywhere — that was the previous, now-replaced system.
Don't reintroduce soft blurred shadows or rotation.
Don't use gradient text, hero-metric stat blocks, glassmorphism, or cream/beige surfaces anywhere.
Don't introduce parchment-and-dragons fantasy-tavern illustration, mascots, or quest-log copy.
Don't let the mobile nav collapse with no replacement.
Don't let a listed group exceed 4 items without splitting into labeled sub-groups.
Don't set body-length copy in uppercase.
